author.name: Morgan
author.description: Cofounder/CTO @BoldMetrics - love building teams and software, in that order. Early @ Sonos, Engineering @ Carnegie Mellon. Not an expert - always learning.

tweet.text:
Just published. 

If you've been trying to figure out how to optimize OpenClaw now that things have gotten a bit complicated with Opus, this might help.

linked_tweet.article_title: If you run OpenClaw, you should know about Multi-Agent Routing

article_topic: OpenClaw Multi-Agent Routing — running multiple isolated agents within a single Gateway instance with separate workspaces, auth, sessions, and deterministic message routing
